name: Event RSVP
description: Event registration and RSVP management with reminders and attendee tracking

config.messageText:
Welcome! Here are the event details:

Annual Tech Summit 2026
Date: April 15, 2026
Time: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Venue: Convention Center, Hall A

Would you like to register? Reply YES to RSVP!

config.systemPrompt:
Collect the attendee's registration information:
1. Full name
2. Email address
3. Number of guests (max 2 additional)
4. Dietary restrictions (if any)
5. Any accessibility needs

Ask naturally, one question at a time.

config.messageText: No problem! If you change your mind, just message us 'RSVP' and we'll get you registered. Hope to see you at a future event!

You're registered! Here's your confirmation:

Event: Annual Tech Summit 2026
Attendee: {{name}}
Date: April 15, 2026
Venue: Convention Center, Hall A

Save this message as your ticket. We'll send a reminder the day before. See you there!

Reminder: The Annual Tech Summit is TOMORROW!

Date: April 15, 2026
Time: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Venue: Convention Center, Hall A
Check-in opens at 8:30 AM

Don't forget to bring this message as your ticket. See you there, {{name}}!

knowledge_base.title: Event Details
knowledge_base.content:
Annual Tech Summit 2026
Date: April 15, 2026
Time: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Venue: Convention Center, Hall A

Agenda:
- 9:00 AM: Registration & Coffee
- 9:30 AM: Keynote - Future of AI
- 10:30 AM: Breakout Sessions
- 12:00 PM: Networking Lunch
- 1:30 PM: Workshop Track
- 3:30 PM: Panel Discussion
- 4:30 PM: Closing & Cocktail Hour

Free parking available. Public transit: Bus routes 12, 15, 23.

knowledge_base.title: FAQ
knowledge_base.content:
Q: Is the event free?
A: Yes, the event is free but registration is required.

Q: Can I bring guests?
A: Yes, up to 2 additional guests per registration.

Q: Is there a dress code?
A: Business casual.

Q: Will there be food?
A: Yes, complimentary lunch and refreshments. Please let us know about dietary restrictions.

Q: Can I cancel my RSVP?
A: Yes, just message us and we'll update your registration.
